name: search_file_content
description: Search file contents for a pattern using ripgrep. Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers. Supports regular expressions. Significantly faster than grep for large codebases.

pattern.description: The search pattern (string or regular expression).

path.description: Directory or file to search in. Defaults to the current working directory.

file_glob.description: Glob pattern to restrict which files are searched (e.g., '*.py', '*.{js,ts}').

case_sensitive.description: Whether the search is case-sensitive. Defaults to true.

context_lines.description: Number of lines of context to show before and after each match. Defaults to 0.

max_results.description: Maximum number of matching lines to return. Defaults to 100.

fixed_string.description: Treat the pattern as a literal string rather than a regex. Defaults to false.
